title: ginkgo biloba var. variegata
intro: Ginkgo biloba var. variegata, a unique and rare cultivar of the ginkgo biloba tree, is a deciduous tree known for its distinctive, mottled leaves. The leaves and seeds of the ginkgo biloba var. variegata tree have been used in traditional medicine for centuries, with medicinal properties attributed to their high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits associated with ginkgo biloba var. variegata include improved cognitive function, reduced risk of cardiovascular disease, and enhanced blood flow to the brain and extremities. Ginkgo biloba var. variegata is often prepared as an herbal supplement in capsule or tablet form, as well as a tea or tincture, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
